title: Sorghum and Millets Diseases A Second World Review
abstract:
This book is the product of an international workshop held at Harare, Zimbabwe, in Mar 1988. Progress made on sorghum diseases since the first global workshop held in India in 1978 is reviewed; research needs and goals for the next decade are identified; and the strengthening of working relationships
among pathologists studying sorghum and millets diseases discussed. Also included are recommendations made by workshop participants and reports on group discussions.
